steps.title: Add the equations
steps.content:
Add the two equations so the $y+3$ terms cancel.
$$(x-2)-8(y+3)=123$$
$$(x-2)+8(y+3)=432$$

steps.title: Solve the expression
steps.content:
Adding gives a direct equation for $x-2$.
$$2(x-2)=123+432$$
$$2(x-2)=555$$
$$x-2=277.5$$
Then multiply by $10$.
$$10(x-2)=10(277.5)$$

steps.title: Give the requested value
steps.content: Evaluate the last product for the requested expression. $$10(277.5)=2{,}775$$ The answer is 2775.
